scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:turbopack && pnpm run build:rspack
scripts.build:turbopack: RUSTFLAGS="--cfg tokio_unstable -Cdebug-assertions=off" cargo +nightly-2026-05-15 run --manifest-path ../../third_party/turbopack/Cargo.toml -p turbopack-cli -- build --dir . --root . --target node --no-minify --no-sourcemap src/entry.js
